title: Ambiguous: improve the doctor command output
description: Vague improvement request that requires the agent to explore, understand the existing code, and make autonomous design decisions. Tests exploration strategy, judgment, and delivery without hand-holding.
prompt:
The `doctor` command output is hard to read and doesn't help users fix problems. Make it better.

The code is in `packages/ai-artifacts/doctor.js` and you can run it with `node packages/ai-artifacts/cli.js doctor` from the repo root.

Requirements:
- Don't break existing tests
- Commit on a feature branch with a conventional commit message
- Write tests for any new behavior you add

acceptance_criteria.description: No regressions in existing test suite
doctor command still runs without error
Agent actually changed doctor.js (not a no-op)
printDoctor output contains grouping, color codes, or structured sections (not flat list)
acceptance_criteria.command: node -e "const {printDoctor,doctorAIArtifacts}=require('./packages/ai-artifacts/doctor.js'); const result=doctorAIArtifacts('.',{packageRoot:require('path').resolve('packages/ai-artifacts')}); let output=''; const origLog=console.log; console.log=(...args)=>{output+=args.join(' ')+'\n'}; printDoctor(result); console.log=origLog; const hasStructure=output.includes('─')||output.includes('━')||output.includes('\x1b[')||output.includes('##')||/^[A-Z][a-z]+:/m.test(output)||output.includes('Summary:')||output.includes('Issues:')||output.split('\n').filter(l=>/^\s*$/.test(l)).length>=2; if(!hasStructure) process.exit(1)"

acceptance_criteria.description: Failed checks include a hint or suggested fix
acceptance_criteria.command: node -e "const {printDoctor}=require('./packages/ai-artifacts/doctor.js'); let output=''; const origLog=console.log; console.log=(...args)=>{output+=args.join(' ')+'\n'}; printDoctor({ok:false,detectedTools:[],checks:[{status:'fail',message:'artifact lock exists'}]}); console.log=origLog; const lower=output.toLowerCase(); if(!lower.includes('run')||(!lower.includes('fetch')&&!lower.includes('sync')&&!lower.includes('fix')&&!lower.includes('create'))) process.exit(1)"

acceptance_criteria.description: Agent added test coverage for the improvements
Agent modified at least 2 files (doctor.js + tests)
acceptance_criteria.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const diff=fs.readFileSync(require('path').join(process.env.RUN_DIR,'changes.diff'),'utf8'); const files=(diff.match(/^diff --git/gm)||[]).length; if(files<2) process.exit(1)"

acceptance_criteria.description: Agent committed on a feature branch
